commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content: The vision was so obscure that the prophet needed the angel's teaching. (St. Jerome)

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: The vision was so obscure that the prophet needed the angel's teaching.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: That is, I have been sent to thee and have come (B) forth, not from the presence of God in the sense of departing from Him, but only in the sense of coming unto thee.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
